name: load-tests-k6
description: Testes de carga e performance com k6 e relatórios Allure

scripts.test:all: npm run test:load && npm run test:stress && npm run test:spike && npm run test:scenarios
scripts.allure:generate: node scripts/generate-allure-report.js && npx allure generate allure-results -o allure-report --clean
